name: ikomia-cli
documentation:
# Ikomia command line interface

## Installation
```
$> python3 -m venv .venv
$> source .venv/bin/activate
$> pip install ikomia-cli
```

## Manage Ikomia algorithms

List local algorithms
```
$> $ ikcli algo local ls
```

Create a new empty algorithm
```
$> $ ikcli algo local create your_new_algo
```

List algorithms from Ikomia HUB
```
$> $ ikcli hub ls
```

Show Ikomia HUB algorithm details
```
$> $ ikcli hub show algo_name
```

modules.name: ikcli.algos.templates.{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}.{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}_widget
documentation:
Failed to index ``ikcli/algos/templates/{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}/{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}_widget.py`` due to ``Syntax Error @ 1:1.
tokenizer error: no matching outer block for dedent

{%- if cookiecutter.widget_class == "CWorkflowTaskWidget" %}
^``

modules.name: ikcli.algos.templates.{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}.{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}_process
documentation:
Failed to index ``ikcli/algos/templates/{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}/{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}_process.py`` due to ``Syntax Error @ 2:3.
parser error: error at 1:2: expected one of *, **, +, -, ..., AWAIT, False, NAME, NUMBER, None, True, lambda, not, }, ~

{%-   set base_class_fqdn = "core.CWorkflowTask" %}
  ^``

modules.name: ikcli.algos.templates.{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}.{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}
documentation:
Failed to index ``ikcli/algos/templates/{{cookiecutter.plugin_dir}}/{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}.py`` due to ``Syntax Error @ 3:7.
parser error: error at 2:6: expected one of ., ..., NAME

from {{cookiecutter.algo_name}}.{{cookiecutter.algo_name}}_process import {{ cookiecutter.class_name }}ParamFactory
      ^``

Append observer to observer list.

Call observers to notify upload progress.

Args:
    monitor: A MultipartEncoderMonitor

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.request
documentation:
Send an HTTP request.

Args:
    method: HTTP method
    path: Query path as URL
    query: URL query params
    data: Data to send
    files: A dict that contains (filename, fh) pair

Returns:
    A tuple with raw content and headers

Raises:
    HTTPBadCodeError: If server return a code <200 or >299
    requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: If request timeout

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.head
documentation:
HEAD HTTP Request.

Args:
    path: request path
    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.get
documentation:

Args:
    path: request path
    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.post
documentation:
POST HTTP Request.

Args:
    path: request path

    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.put
documentation:
PUT HTTP Request.

Args:
    path: request path
    data: Payload data
    files: A dict that contains info about files to send
    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.patch
documentation:
PATCH HTTP Request.

Args:
    path: request path

    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

methods.name: ikcli.net.http.core.HTTPRequest.delete
documentation:
DELETE HTTP Request.

Args:
    path: request path
    query: Query param as dict

Returns:
    Python data

modules.name: ikcli.utils.version
documentation: Parse and manipulate version.

classes.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__init__
documentation:
Initialize a new version.

Args:
    version: Version as str

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__hash__
documentation:
Hash Version object to use it as dict key.

Returns:
    A hash of version object

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__repr__
documentation:
Return a human readable representation of version.

Returns:
    A str to represent version

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version._parse
documentation:
Parse version and return dict for each version member (ie major / minor / patch / release and metadata).

Args:
    version: Version to parse

Returns:
    A dict that contains an entry for each version member

Raises:
    ValueError: If version is not semver compatible

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version._cmp
documentation:
Compare two versions.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    A int as result. 0 is equals, <0 if other is greater, >0 if other is less.

Raises:
    TypeError: If other is not a version object

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.clone
documentation:
Return a new version that can be overriden by args.

Args:
    major: A major digit for version. If None use this version major.
    minor: A minor digit for version. If None use this version minor.
    patch: A patch digit for version. If None use this version patch.

Returns:
    A new Version

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.next_major
documentation:
Return next major version.

Returns:
    Next major Version

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.next_minor
documentation:
Return next minor version.

Returns:
    Next minor version.

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.next_patch
documentation:
Return next patch version.

Returns:
    Next patch version.

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__eq__
documentation:
Return True if versions are equals.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    True if equals

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__lt__
documentation:
Test if this version is less than an other.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    True if less than other

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__le__
documentation:
Test if this version is less or equals than an other.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    True if less or equals than other

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__gt__
documentation:
Test if this version is greater than another.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    True if greater

methods.name: ikcli.utils.version.Version.__ge__
documentation:
Test if this version is greater or equals than another.

Args:
    other: An other version

Returns:
    True if greater or equals
A version object to manage, validate or compare versions.
